index.html에 FR/IT 언어 버튼 추가

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: Telegram "no response generated" — synthesis, person fields, calendar range (#44)

Three root causes for empty/wrong Telegram responses:

1. When the LLM exhausted all 5 tool rounds, the synthesis round ran
   without tools AND without any instruction to produce text. The LLM
   saw a conversation ending in tool results and produced nothing.
   Fix: add explicit synthesis instruction + fallback from tool results.

2. person_info omitted birthday, company, and position fields — data
   from Apple Contacts was fetched but never shown to the LLM.

3. Calendar search hardcoded ±30 days, missing recurring events like
   birthdays months away. Widened default to ±180 days.

Also: gitignore live e2e test file (contains real names for integration
tests against live server).

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: flush tqdm buffer periodically for reliable progress updates

tqdm uses \r (not \n) in pipe mode, causing progress lines to stay
in the incompleteLine buffer indefinitely. Added periodic flush in
the elapsed timer (every 2s) and final flush on process close.

commit.message:
Fix uniform memory: random key init + remove usage gating from attention

All 64 slots had identical usage (2.667) because:
1. Zero keys → identical cosine sim → uniform attention → uniform writes
2. Usage gating (sims * usage) made it worse when usage was uniform

Fix: init keys with random normalized vectors for symmetry breaking.
Remove usage from content attention — similarity alone determines which
slots to read. Allocation in store() still uses usage for slot filling.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Switch to independent per-layer collapses and add batch deploy

Replace single cave-in depth with independent per-layer collapse bitmask
(uint8). Each layer 1-7 rolls its own collapse chance using different
16-bit windows of the VRF seed, creating more varied outcomes. Also adds
deployMulti() for single-transaction multi-layer deployment.

- CaveInMath: deriveCollapsedLayers() returns bitmask instead of depth
- DrillGame: collapsedLayers field, deployMulti(), updated payout logic
- Frontend: all components, services, types use bitmask survival checks
- Dynamic multiplier: iterates 128 bitmask scenarios (2^7 layers)
- Updated contract addresses for Base Sepolia redeployment
- 120 tests pass, production build succeeds

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(auth): server-side OIDC code exchange to avoid CORS issues

The browser-side token exchange from the frontend to Authentik's token
endpoint was blocked by CORS. Move the authorization code → token
exchange to a new backend endpoint (/api/auth/oidc/code-exchange) that
performs the request server-side, eliminating cross-origin restrictions.

commit.message:
Move anchor IDs from sticky headings to non-sticky section wrappers

The id attribute was on sticky <h2>/<h3>/etc. elements, causing browsers
to scroll to the stuck visual position instead of the document-flow
position. Fix by placing IDs on the parent <section> wrappers instead,
letting native anchor navigation work correctly without JS workarounds.

Removes ~50 lines of JS complexity (cachedTops, trueOffsetTop,
recalcTops, click interception, load/resize recalculation).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: S3 资源加载防护与缓存安全加固

- COEP: require-corp → credentialless，修复 Chrome 跨域拦截
- S3 大文件(VRM/FBX/GLB/HDR)全路径走流式代理，不再 302 redirect
- preload: cache: force-cache → default，防止缓存过期 presigned URL
- use-scene-store: 入口/持久化/rehydrate 三处自动 toS3ReadUrl() 转换
- MainScene: resolvedModelUrl 兜底 toS3ReadUrl()
- avatar-proxy: 5s 超时 + 失败返回透明 PNG（不再 502）
- 流式代理 Cache-Control: max-age=3600（去掉 immutable）
- layout: 补齐 pixelFont.variable 解决 hydration mismatch
- 新增 docs/s3-cors-caching-guide.md 经验文档

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: smart multi-signal client extraction with confidence scoring

Replace dumb regex client extraction with a multi-signal system that
uses 5 independent extractors, each with confidence weights:

1. Case study AI extraction (0.9) — scrapes top 3 case study URLs and
   uses Gemini Flash to extract client company names
2. Section-aware extraction (0.8) — only extracts from content under
   "Our Clients", "Trusted By", "Who We Work With" headers
3. Logo alt text (0.75) — image alt text within client sections
4. Testimonial attribution (0.65) — "— Name, VP at Company" patterns
5. Case study title parsing (0.6) — heuristic extraction from titles

Cross-validation: names from 2+ sources get +0.1 confidence boost.
Threshold: only returns clients with confidence >= 0.5.
If no clients pass threshold, returns empty (shows nothing vs garbage).

Removes old extractClients() from jina-scraper.ts and
extractClientNames() from deep-crawler.ts.

fix(api): add manifest commands for timecards and cycle count delete (P0.3, P0.4)

P0.3 - Timecards Delete:
- Add softDelete command to time-entry-rules.manifest
- Add ManagersCanDeleteEntries policy (manager/admin only)
- Add TimeEntryDeleted event for audit trail
- Update DELETE route to use executeManifestCommand
- Remove direct DB update bypass

P0.4 - Cycle Count Records Delete:
- Add remove command to cycle-count-rules.manifest
- Add guard to prevent removing verified records
- Add CycleCountRecordRemoved event
- Update DELETE route to use "remove" instead of "verify"
- Remove semantically incorrect workaround

Also fixes pre-existing type errors in list routes:
- Remove deletedAt filters from models without soft delete

commit.message:
fix: remove duplicate OnChatMessage handler causing 3x message duplication

The ShowAgentChatReply method added a new _signaling.OnChatMessage handler
each time a chat form was created, but never unsubscribed them. After closing
and reopening the chat form, handlers accumulated causing messages to appear
multiple times. The original handler at line 1046 already routes all messages
through ShowAgentChatReply, making the inner handler redundant.

commit.message:
Optimize parsing performance while preserving output parity

- MftEntry: use from_slice(&[u8]) instead of from_buffer(Vec), copy only
  used_size bytes; remove Cursor-based header parsing for direct from_le_bytes
- Timestamp formatting: use write!() with direct field access instead of
  chrono's format() pattern parsing (called millions of times)
- Flag decoding: write directly to String buffer instead of Vec<&str> + join()
  for SI flags, file attributes, and USN reason flags
- MFT hot loop: reduce string clones with std::mem::take on last iteration,
  extract resolve_parent_path helper using push_str instead of format!()
- USN path lookup: Vec indexed by entry number instead of HashMap (O(1) direct)
- USN read helpers: inline from_le_bytes instead of Cursor + ReadBytesExt
- UTF-16LE decoding: stack buffer for filenames <= 128 chars (no heap alloc)
- BufWriter capacity: 8KB -> 256KB for CSV output

Verified: byte-for-byte identical output on 369K-entry MFT test file.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Request user.info.profile and user.info.username scopes

Enable bulk PDF upload in Library

- File input now accepts multiple files

  sharing category/folder/tags from the form
- Progress bar shown during bulk upload
- Title field labelled as single-upload only
